case_title: PETER J. FATOOH VS. SANDRA UNG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $25.00) SERVED JUN-29-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UNG, SANDRA
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,789.30 FILED BY FATOOH, PETER J. AS TO DEFENDANT UNG, SANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FATOOH, PETER J.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-09-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF PETER J. FATOOH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE AUGUST HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE PRIOR HEARING AND IF THERE WERE NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
